mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_key, role_sort, data_scope, status, del_flag, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_role
del_flag = 0
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND role_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleKey}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY role_sort ASC, create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role
del_flag = 0
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND role_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleKey}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_role SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
